name: Otherworldly Patron
description: Choose an Otherworldly Patron, which grants additional features as you gain Warlock levels.

name: Pact Magic
description: Your patron grants you magical power through Pact Magic, using spell slots that recharge on a short or long rest.

name: Eldritch Invocations
description: You learn eldritch invocations, magical abilities granted by your patron. You gain additional invocations as you gain Warlock levels.

name: Pact Boon
description: Choose a Pact Boon, gaining a special gift from your patron that shapes your abilities.

name: Mystic Arcanum
description: Your patron bestows powerful magical secrets, allowing you to cast high-level spells once without expending a spell slot.

name: Eldritch Master
description: You can spend 1 minute entreating your patron to regain all of your expended Pact Magic spell slots.
